parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM public.fn_select_pedido_reutilizable(
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono }}',
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.session_id }}',
  '{{ String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.pedido_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  false,
  {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }}
)
SELECT datos_bancarios, direccion, moneda FROM restaurante WHERE id = {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }} LIMIT 1

UPDATE pedidos
SET
  metodo_pago = {{
    String($("When Executed by Another Workflow").first().json.metodo || "").toLowerCase().trim().includes("transfer") ? "'transferencia'" :
    String($("When Executed by Another Workflow").first().json.metodo || "").toLowerCase().trim().includes("bizum") ? "'bizum'" :
    String($("When Executed by Another Workflow").first().json.metodo || "").toLowerCase().trim().includes("online") ? "'online'" :
    (String($("When Executed by Another Workflow").first().json.metodo || "").toLowerCase().trim().includes("tarjeta") || String($("When Executed by Another Workflow").first().json.metodo || "").toLowerCase().trim().includes("card")) ? "'tarjeta'" :
    "'efectivo'"
  }},
  estado = 'recibido',
  estado_pago = 'pendiente',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $("Obtener Pedido con Total").first().json.id }}
RETURNING *

INSERT INTO public.escalaciones
  (restaurante_id, telefono, problema, contexto, conversation_id, account_id, contact_id, tipo_escalacion, estado)
VALUES (
  {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }},
  '{{ $input.first().json.telefono.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $input.first().json.problema_escalacion.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{"subflujo": "Pago", "tipo": "error_sistema"}'::jsonb,
  '', '', '', 'error_sistema', 'pendiente'
)
